hero.heading: Welcome to Pure Luxury
hero.description: Professional wallpapering and interior design services with punctual service, expert craftsmanship, and meticulous attention to detail. Experience the difference quality makes.

about.heading: Premium Interior Design & Wallpapering
about.paragraph1: At Contour Interior Design, we specialize in professional interior design and wallpapering services in Austin. Our team arrives punctually, maintains the highest standards of professionalism, and ensures your vision becomes reality.
about.paragraph2: We take pride in meticulous preparation, careful installation, and attention to every detail. Your satisfaction is our priority, and our 5-star reviews reflect our commitment to excellence.
about.cardDescription: Stars rating with 100% client satisfaction across all projects in Austin, Texas

items.title: Professional Wallpapering
items.description: Expert wallpaper installation with meticulous wall preparation, ensuring flawless, long-lasting results for your space.

items.title: Interior Design Consultation
items.description: Professional design guidance to transform your vision into reality with color schemes, layouts, and styling recommendations.

items.title: Wall Preparation & Treatment
items.description: Comprehensive wall preparation including priming, patching, and finishing to ensure perfect results for any project.

items.title: Residential Interior Design
items.description: Complete residential interior design services including bedroom, living room, kitchen, and bathroom transformations.

items.title: Custom Design Solutions
items.description: Tailored design solutions for unique spaces and special requirements with attention to detail and quality craftsmanship.

items.title: Expert Installation & Support

contact.heading: Request a Free Consultation
contact.description: Contact us today for a free consultation on your interior design and wallpapering needs.
contact.successMessage: Thank you! We'll contact you within 24 hours to discuss your project.

items.name: Justice Mckinney
items.review: I was actually unsure of wallpapering initially but these fellows made it so easy. They arrived punctually, extremely polite and well-informed on what they were doing. I didn't have to worry about anything. The wallpaper hanger assisted me with every detail.

items.name: Lina Norton
items.review: I personally loved the way this team went about the wallpapering process. They did not hurry and took care of all the things that were to be done in the first place. The wall was carefully prepared and the wallpaper was put on accurately.
